rankings.title: Mandates and Mavericks — Gender, Electoral Pathway, and Party Discipline in the German Bundestag
conditions: a strong close-race first-stage showing mandate-type assignment actually shifts dependence
extensive pre-trend/placebo checks
a clear discussion of roll-call selection
robustness to alternative “party line” definitions

rankings.title: Do Quotas Breed Loyalty? Gender, Party Discipline, and the Laranja Problem in Brazil's Chamber of Deputies
Quota Shock and Party Loyalty — How National Gender Quotas Reshape MEP Discipline in the European Parliament
conditions: restricting to adoption episodes with credible quasi-exogenous triggers
demonstrating strong first-stage in elected female shares
presenting a battery of placebo tests/negative controls

rankings.title: When the Whip Comes Off — Gender Gaps in German Bundestag "Conscience Votes"
Mandates and Mavericks — Gender, Electoral Pathway, and Party Discipline in the German Bundestag
conditions: demonstrating sufficient sample size
density for the dual-candidate RDD
as this will be the paper's most credible causal claim

rankings.title: When the Whip Comes Off — Gender Gaps in German Bundestag "Conscience Votes"
conditions: finding a highly rigorous way to match free votes to whipped votes—perhaps using text analysis of bills—
proving sufficient statistical power via MDE calculations

rankings.title: Quota Shock and Party Loyalty — How National Gender Quotas Reshape MEP Discipline in the European Parliament
Do Quotas Breed Loyalty? Gender, Party Discipline, and the Laranja Problem in Brazil's Chamber of Deputies
Mandates and Mavericks — Gender, Electoral Pathway, and Party Discipline in the German Bundestag
conditions: robust event-study evidence for parallel trends
power checks for heterogeneity by policy area

rankings.title: When the Whip Comes Off — Gender Gaps in German Bundestag "Conscience Votes"
conditions: power simulations showing MDE coverage
expansion to related low-discipline votes
